features.description: Invoice creation, finalization, delivery, and payment tracking. Master feature — enables the whole /api/v1/invoices/* surface.
Issue credit notes for refunds, adjustments, and write-offs. Reverses paid invoices without mutating them.
Configure tenant-specific invoice number prefixes (INV / SO / RECEIPT / custom 3-8 char). Small tenants get 'INV' only.
Invoice in currencies other than tenant.default_currency. Currency frozen at issuance.
Apply tenant branding (logo, colors, footer) to invoice PDFs. Small tenants get the default Academorix-branded template.
Customize the dunning cadence beyond the default day+3/7/14/30/60 schedule. Enterprise-only.
Automated handoff to a licensed collections agency after N days past due. Enterprise-only.
Extend invoice + credit-note retention from 7 → 10 years. For finance regimes that require longer audit trails (EU VAT, some US states, Canada federal tax).
0-30 / 31-60 / 61-90 / 91+ day past-due aging buckets. Feeds AR management.
Invoiced + collected + AR balance grouped by day/week/month/item_type.
Tax collected grouped by jurisdiction. Feeds VAT/GST/sales-tax return preparation.
